2026-04-09T01:04:07.4937542Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-09T01:04:07.4938355Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-09T01:04:07.4938834Z 
2026-04-09T01:04:07.4939158Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-09T01:04:07.4940094Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-09T01:04:07.4940545Z 
2026-04-09T01:04:07.4940735Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-09T01:04:07.4941044Z

2026-04-09T01:04:07.4941515Z 
2026-04-09T01:04:07.4941678Z   git switch -
